error_signature: Could not locate the bindings file
title: Missing SQLite bindings error in AI Agent node
symptom: When running a workflow with the AI Agent node, n8n throws an error indicating it could not locate the SQLite bindings file, despite using PostgreSQL as the database.
applies_when: n8n is set up with PostgreSQL
not_this_if: n8n is configured to use SQLite
Error occurs in a different node or context
root_cause: The error occurs because the AI Agent node may have a dependency on SQLite bindings, which are not present in the Docker image or setup, even when PostgreSQL is being used as the primary database.
fix_steps: Modify the Dockerfile to include the necessary SQLite dependencies
Rebuild the Docker image with the updated Dockerfile
agent_instruction: Update the Dockerfile to include SQLite dependencies and rebuild the Docker image.
